home.subtitle: The ultimate companion for competitive circles. Track stats, dominate leaderboards, and share your glory.
home.featuresSubtitle: Multiple ways to track performance, ensuring every victory counts toward your legacy.

player.title: Player Leaderboard
player.desc: Rank individual performance across your group. See who has the highest win rate, most wins, and consistent participation.

team.title: Team Leaderboard
team.desc: Track how well specific combinations perform together. Discover the most dominant duos and legendary teammates.

form.title: Dynamic Form Tracking
form.desc: Monitor your recent performance streaks. Are you on fire or in a slump? Our form tracker tells the story.

log.title: Instant Logging
log.desc: Record matches in seconds with our optimized interface. Spend less time logging and more time playing.

goals.title: Personal Goals
goals.desc: Set milestones and track collections over time. Push yourself to reach the next Elo tier.

elo.title: Elo Ratings
elo.desc: Fair and balanced ranking system. Gain more points for defeating higher-ranked opponents.

ctaBottom.title: Start Your Legacy Today
ctaBottom.desc: Available now. No credit card required. Built for the love of the game, by enthusiasts for enthusiasts.

logMatch.title: Log a Match
logMatch.subtitle: Record your latest victory. Select players, set the score, and update the rankings.

validation.needPlayers: Both teams need at least one player.
validation.needScores: Please enter scores for both teams.
validation.noTie: Matches cannot end in a tie.
validation.duplicatePlayer: A player cannot be on both teams.

leaderboard.title: Global Rankings
leaderboard.subtitle: The best of the best. Climb the ranks and secure your legacy.
leaderboard.noPlayers: No players found. Be the first to log a match!
